foreignObject.h5:div: Ever since I started programming at around 14 years old I have been fascinated by interactively exploring ideas and
finding problems to my mediocre solutions. The projects coming out of that were slowly but almost always for sure
forgotten over time, even by myself. In the last few weeks I figured that to be a real shame and that I should start
writing down my ideas and solutions to them, especially because technical writing is a skill I enjoy and want to
Because I don’t do things by halves, I intent to reignite my online persona
and use it to cover all these
technical/semi-professional aspects of my life. It shall be used as a central point of reference for myself, including
, career and professional information, as well as (probably very unregular) blog posts on
Now, there is one problem: The website does not yet exist. So let’s go build it. Let’s use
But why not use Markdown or some of the 1000 blog static site generators out there?
Very good question. There are a few reasons for that, most importantly:
Writing code is fun and with our custom implementation only our imagination
(Unfotunately artistic creativity is none of my strengths)
Furthermore, I really enjoy Typst for its capabilities and yet simplicity. It is a joy to write and the results are beautiful.

Custom process for creating embeddable svg documents
with svg base64 data with decoded svg content inline
How to make responsive in website
Build multiple variants of the same document with different widths and themes
Delta compress all of them with custom xdelta3 bindings to arbitary reference
Store these compressed files as base64 in the static website (handled by server components of NextJS)
Decode with fitting browser side decompression library depending on browser div width and theme
Centralized look and feel for blogs and website
Remove flickering of iframe content when new size loads
More powerful blog description/preview content support, currently onyl metadata string
Better compression by comparing all combinations of refs
Replace custom update time detection with manual metadata field
Brotli customDictionary compression to python xdelta3 to create a vcdiff patch.
